deletion_protection.description: Indicates whether deletion protection is enabled, preventing accidental deletion of the Neptune global cluster.

engine.description: Specifies the database engine for the Neptune global cluster, such as "neptune".

engine_version.description: Specifies the database engine version for the Neptune global cluster; must be compatible with Neptune global cluster requirements.

global_cluster_identifier.description: Unique identifier for the global Neptune cluster; must be unique across all existing clusters in the AWS account.

source_db_cluster_identifier.description: Identifier of the source Neptune DB cluster to use for creating the global cluster; must be a valid DB cluster ARN.

storage_encrypted.description: Specifies whether the global cluster storage is encrypted. Must be set to true for encryption to be enabled.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout durations for creating, updating, and deleting the Neptune global cluster.
